findings.summary: Current monitoring board with AK5534 ADC and CH32V305. Current sense resistors R1=0.1ohm, R2=1ohm not detected on a board literally named 'currentmonitor'. I2S bus not detected; SCL/SDA falsely detected as I2C.

correct.description: All 13 MOSFETs correctly mapped as transistor circuits

incorrect.description: SCL/SDA nets from AK5534 clock-select pins falsely detected as I2C -- these are actually clock-select pins named SCL/SDA by the designer, not I2C

missed.description: R1 (0.1 ohm), R2 (1 ohm) current sense resistors not detected on a board named 'currentmonitor'
I2S bus (I2SCK, I2SSD, I2SWS nets) between AK5534 and CH32V305 not detected -- no I2S detector

suggestions: Low-value resistors (<1 ohm) should be detected as current sense candidates
Add I2S bus detection (I2SCK/BCLK, I2SWS/LRCK, I2SD/SDIN/SDOUT patterns)
